extDescription.message: Download free YouTube Studio music tracks with clean metadata-based filenames.

lblDownloadAllTracks.description: Label for the button used to download all detected audio tracks

lblDownloadCurrentPage.description: Label for the button used to download only the currently loaded YouTube Studio music page.

lblDownloadCurrentPageNote.message: Downloads only the tracks currently loaded in the visible YouTube Studio music page.
lblDownloadCurrentPageNote.description: Tooltip text for the current page download button.

lblDownloadAllTracksNote.message: Collects every YouTube Studio music page, prepares direct URLs, then sends downloads to the browser.
lblDownloadAllTracksNote.description: Tooltip text for the download button.

msgScanningPage.description: Status shown while the content script scans the current page.

msgAudioTrackFound.message: 1 audio track found. Download will start soon.
msgAudioTrackFound.description: Notification message displayed when 1 track is detected.

msgAudioTracksFound.message: $TRACK_COUNT$ audio track(s) found. Download will start soon.
msgAudioTracksFound.description: Notification message displayed when tracks are detected.

msgQueuedDownloads.description: Status shown after URLs have been handed to the browser download manager.

msgWaitingForDirectUrls.description: Status shown while the extension waits for captured YouTube Studio API data.

msgCollectingAllPages.message: Collecting all YouTube Studio music pages...
msgCollectingAllPages.description: Status shown before the extension starts paginating through YouTube Studio music pages.

msgCollectingPages.description: Status shown while YouTube Studio music pages are being collected.

msgCollectingCurrentPage.description: Status shown while the current YouTube Studio music page is being collected.

msgPreparingDownloads.description: Status shown while direct download URLs are being prepared.

msgCollectionTimedOut.message: Timed out while collecting YouTube Studio music pages.
msgCollectionTimedOut.description: Status shown when full page collection takes too long.

msgCollectionFailed.message: Could not collect YouTube Studio music pages. Reload the extension, refresh YouTube Studio, then try again.
msgCollectionFailed.description: Status shown when full page collection fails.

msgDirectUrlsNotReady.message: Direct download URLs are not ready yet. Reload the YouTube Studio page after reloading the extension, then scroll the loaded tracks again.
msgDirectUrlsNotReady.description: Status shown when direct URLs have not been captured and UI button fallback is disabled.

msgNativeDownloadButtonsFound.message: $TRACK_COUNT$ native download button(s) found. Starting them immediately.
msgNativeDownloadButtonsFound.description: Notification shown when no direct URLs were found but page buttons were detected.

msgNativeDownloadButtonsClicked.description: Status shown after native download buttons have been clicked.

msgDownloadFinishedWithErrors.description: Notification shown after a batch download partially fails.

msgDownloadRequestFailed.message: The browser could not start some downloads.
msgDownloadRequestFailed.description: Status shown when the download request fails.

msgAudioTracksNotFound.message: No audio tracks found. Check your filters and scroll the YouTube Studio music list until the tracks are loaded.
msgAudioTracksNotFound.description: Notification message displayed when no track can be detected.
